title: cerastium vulgatum var. glomeratum
intro: Cerastium vulgatum var. glomeratum, also known as Sticky Mouse-ear or Ramsted, is a perennial herbaceous plant within the carnation family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Cerastium vulgatum var. glomeratum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
